evidence: "An interesting profile on one of the biggest drug lords of Colombia..."
"Excellent twist on the traditional Sherlock Holmes mysteries."
"Plot is often difficult to follow, but you get used to it and actually start enjoying it."
"Thoroughly enjoyed this program! It deals with questions that at one time or another flitted through my mind but I never asked about."
"The subject matter is great but the movie itself is jumpy and confusing."
"The story line is fast moving, believable and entertaining."
"Totally refreshing to get another perspective than the 'pyramids are tombs' and the 'timeline is sacred'."
"The casting is spot on! Benedict Cumberbatch IS the modern version of the great detective."
"Personally, the three Harriet Vane mysteries are my favorites."
"The joy and tears of the performers, the gut wrenching anticipation..."
"An amazing feat of preservation of a body over 2000 years old."
"At that moment you love the world and everybody in it."
"It is down-to-earth in its presentation and conclusions, solicits the opinions of many diverse people..."

summary: The user enjoys complex documentaries and mysteries, often appreciating high production quality and emotional depth. They have a mixed preference for pacing and show some loyalty to specific creators, but overall, they value insightful and thought-provoking content.
